There are no negative constraints of any kind  Note that German Whispers in this puzzle require a difference of at least 5, like in a 9x9 Grid.  3) Additionally, in each grid, one cell in every row, column, and box contains a doubler. For purposes of clues, a cell with a doubler counts for twice its value.  4) No two of these six puzzles contain doublers in the same cell.
